name: Energy Toxin Bottle
description:
This glass bottle embellished with brass decorations appears to be a lesser energy breath potion of a specific type, but has been polluted, making it toxic to use.

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Effect You drink from the bottle and must succeed at a saving throw or become Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure) and immediately vomit the potion directly onto yourself, taking ] damage of the same damage type the potion deals and expending the item. If you succeed at your Fortitude save, you become sickened 1 but otherwise are able to unleash Energy Breath as normal for a lesser energy breath potion of the appropriate type.
